_comment: Pinned TinyCC runtime-helper TU partition for SecureOS x86_64 freestanding builds (issue #548, umbrella #408 / #403). Companion to vendor/tinycc/Makefile.secureos porting note 2 and vendor/tinycc/libc-deps.json. This manifest explicitly partitions vendor/tinycc/tinycc/lib/*.{c,S} into the files we intentionally compile into libtcc1.a for SecureOS (`required`) and the files we intentionally exclude (`excluded`) with one-line reasons. The host drift gate `tinycc_libtcc1_srcs` fails when upstream adds/removes/renames a TU without this file being updated.

required.reason: Core runtime helper implementations consumed by x86_64 ELF output.
x86_64 va_list ABI companion object used by TinyCC runtime support.
Compiler builtins/runtime helper entrypoints used by generated code.
Runtime support for __atomic builtins expected by TinyCC output.
Assembly atomic helpers paired with stdatomic.c.
Stack-allocation helper required by runtime helper set.
Backtrace-compatible alloca variant referenced by TinyCC runtime make rules.
Unix ELF dsohandle helper included by TinyCC x86_64 Linux object set.

excluded.reason: ARM EABI helper TU; not part of SecureOS x86_64 target.
ARM cache/flush helper; not used by x86_64 target.
AArch64 runtime helper TU; excluded from x86_64 builds.
i386-specific PIC helper; excluded from x86_64 SecureOS target.
Backtrace runtime TU; CONFIG_TCC_BACKTRACE is disabled in SecureOS config.
Windows DLL backtrace runtime TU; irrelevant for SecureOS target.
Backtrace log helper TU; excluded with backtrace feature.
Native/JIT run-entry helper; SecureOS uses file-output flow (no -run path).
Test coverage runtime helper; not part of SecureOS runtime-helper archive.
